---
title: "R for Marine Science - Workshop 2 Final Exercise "
author: "Katie Dyck"
date: "2026-06-04"
execute:
  echo: false
format:
    html:
        embed-resources: true
        code-fold: show
        code-tools: true
        code-block-bg: true
        code-block-border-left: "darkgrey"
        code-overflow: wrap
        toc: true
        number-sections: true
        number-depth: 4
        toc-location: left
        toc-expand: 2
        toc-title: Contents
        syntax-highlighting: github
        theme: cosmo
        fig-height: 6
        fig-width: 10
        fig-cap-location: bottom
---

This is my code for the Keystone exercise "Estuary Fish Survey".

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  include = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE)
```

```{r load packages}
# Load necessary packages
library(tidyverse)  # includes `stringr` and `lubridate` packages
library(here)
library(readxl)
```


# Phase 1: Ingestion and Decontamination

The first step is to load the datasets. 

```{r load datasets}
# Load the datasets
read_xlsx(here::here("/Documents/MB5370/github/R4MarineScience/data/workshop2/estuary_catch_log.xlsx"))
```
